narrative:
Mt Orab North (precinct in Brown County) has 1,051 registered voters, with 64.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.4 percentage points.
